entry.title: New: BILL041(24) (Honolulu) — PUBLISH
entry.content:
RELATING TO THE PUBLIC SPAY AND NEUTER CLINIC FOR DOGS AND CATS.

Repeals portions of the Public Spay and Neuter Clinic for Dogs and Cats program and authorizes the CSD to adopt administrative rules to implement, administer, and enforce the program.

Latest action: Final reading notice published in the Honolulu Star-Advertiser.

View on the council site
